title: Tigray one year of conflict - Casualties of the armed conflict, 2020-2021 - Tigray, Ethiopia
pages_or_sections: Introductory summary; Annex A; Annex B
strengths: Conflict-specific, local incident compilation with monthly ranges and many event descriptions.
limitations: Civilian-focused, incomplete, and not a combatant-death source; the database evolves over time.
notes: Primary source for E1 civilian direct deaths.

title: Methodology - Ethiopia: Tigray War
strengths: Transparent about source pipeline, verification process, and undercount risk.
limitations: Not a frozen episode dataset and not itself a direct death estimate.
notes: Useful for confidence notes and undercount discussion.

title: Incidents - Ethiopia: Tigray War
strengths: Shows the scale of the evolving incident database and later updates.
limitations: Broader and later than E1; not a frozen episode-total source.

title: Report of the Ethiopian Human Rights Commission (EHRC)/Office of the United Nations High Commissioner for Human Rights (OHCHR) Joint Investigation into Alleged Violations of International Human Rights, Humanitarian and Refugee Law Committed by All Parties to the Conflict in the Tigray Region of the Federal Democratic Republic of Ethiopia
author_or_org: OHCHR and Ethiopian Human Rights Commission
pages_or_sections: Mandate period; p.60 IDP figure and note
strengths: Major investigation with interviews and legal framing.
limitations: Not an event-by-event casualty census and not designed as an episode-total death count.
notes: Used mainly for period cutoff, IDP context, and side attribution.

title: Ethiopia: Situation in Tigray
strengths: Accessible synthesis of UN/OCHA-style population and displacement figures.
limitations: Secondary compilation rather than a primary census or registry.
notes: Used for the civilian denominator anchor.

title: Factbox: The forces fighting in Ethiopia's Tigray conflict
strengths: Provides explicit in-theater force estimates and cites diplomats, Janes, and ICG.
limitations: Opening-war snapshot only; force levels changed thereafter.
notes: Primary denominator anchor for combatant exposure.

title: Ethiopia offensive kills 550 'extremists' in Tigray: TV
strengths: Uses explicit death wording and gives an early-war combatant-loss anchor.
limitations: One-sided official wartime claim without independent verification.
notes: Used only as a lower-bound anchor, not as an E1 total.

title: Ethiopia commission says Tigray youth group killed 600 civilians in Nov 9 attack
strengths: Specific event with both victim-side and inflicting-side detail.
limitations: Single atrocity event rather than an episode total.

title: Ethiopia: Eritrean Forces Massacre Tigray Civilians
strengths: Detailed event investigation with witness testimony and clear side attribution.
limitations: Single atrocity site; lower-bound phrasing for deaths.

title: Ethiopia's Tigray forces say they freed 1,000 captured soldiers
strengths: Signals very large recent combat losses/captures and helps bound the scale of attrition.
limitations: Not a death count; belligerent claim; Reuters could not independently confirm.
notes: Used only as context for model-generated combatant-death bounds.

title: Tigrayans accused of massacre in Ethiopia war, both sides claim advances
strengths: Shows the kind of large but unusable battlefield-loss rhetoric present early in the war.
limitations: Uses 'destroyed' rather than a death term and Reuters could not verify it.

title: Conflict Trends: A Global Overview, 1946-2024
pages_or_sections: p. 6 definition of battle-related deaths; p. 9 discussion of Tigray 2021-2022
limitations: Not episode-specific and not separated by civilian/combatant victim class.
notes: Context only; excluded from core DR numerators.

title: Civilian death and injury from airstrikes: evidence from the war in Tigray, Ethiopia
geographic_scope: Six zones and 24 districts of Tigray (Western Tigray excluded)
strengths: Structured later-phase direct-civilian dataset with subgroup metrics.
limitations: Airstrikes only and spans multiple proposed episodes.
notes: Useful auxiliary source for later phases, not used in E1 DR.
